2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.4.6 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5605.issue: [W5605] i18n "admin/i18n" language "ru" has 1 outdated key(s) not present in English: _comment_extendedLogging

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/searchInterval" attribute "label" uses key "_searchIntervalHint" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0077.issue: [E0077] "eslint.config.mjs" should use installed "@iobroker/eslint-config" via `import config from '@iobroker/eslint-config';`.

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "rimraf" (devDependencies) can be updated from 6.1.2 to 6.1.3. The newer version has been published for 99 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/boergegrunicke/ioBroker.govee-local/blob/master/package.json).

0078.issue: [W0078] Remove obsolete eslint/prettier devDependencies when using "@iobroker/eslint-config": eslint, prettier.
